channel.title: Rust on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Rust on Arrans github.io

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: n0-computer/iroh
item.description: IP addresses break, dial keys instead. Modular networking stack in Rust.

item.title: DioxusLabs/dioxus
item.description: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.

item.title: helix-editor/helix
item.description: A post-modern modal text editor.

item.title: tree-sitter/tree-sitter
item.description: An incremental parsing system for programming tools

item.title: rust-unofficial/awesome-rust
item.description: A curated list of Rust code and resources.

item.title: slint-ui/slint
item.description: Slint is an open-source declarative GUI toolkit to build native user interfaces for Rust, C++, JavaScript, or Python apps.

item.title: microsoft/edit
item.description: We all edit.

item.title: flxzt/rnote
item.description: Sketch and take handwritten notes.

item.title: sxyazi/yazi
item.description: 💥 Blazing fast terminal file manager written in Rust, based on async I/O.

item.title: toeverything/AFFiNE
item.description: There can be more than Notion and Miro. AFFiNE(pronounced [ə‘fain]) is a next-gen knowledge base that brings planning, sorting and creating all together. Privacy first, open-source, customizable and ready to use.

item.title: wezterm/wezterm
item.description: A GPU-accelerated cross-platform terminal emulator and multiplexer written by @wez and implemented in Rust

item.title: denoland/deno
item.description: A modern runtime for JavaScript and TypeScript.

item.title: sharkdp/bat
item.description: A cat(1) clone with wings.

item.title: stalwartlabs/stalwart
item.description: All-in-one Mail & Collaboration server. Secure, scalable and fluent in every protocol (IMAP, JMAP, SMTP, CalDAV, CardDAV, WebDAV).

item.title: TM9657/flow-like
item.description: Flow-Like: Strongly Typed Enterprise Scale Workflows. Built for scalability, speed, seamless AI integration and rich customization.

item.title: spacedriveapp/spacedrive
item.description: Spacedrive is an open source cross-platform file explorer, powered by a virtual distributed filesystem written in Rust.

item.title: ogham/exa
item.description: A modern replacement for ‘ls’.

item.title: starship/starship
item.description: ☄🌌️ The minimal, blazing-fast, and infinitely customizable prompt for any shell!

item.title: Rust-GPU/rust-gpu
item.description: 🐉 Making Rust a first-class language and ecosystem for GPU shaders 🚧

item.title: qarmin/czkawka
item.description: Multi functional app to find duplicates, empty folders, similar images etc.

item.title: compiler-explorer/compiler-explorer
item.description: Run compilers interactively from your web browser and interact with the assembly

item.title: sharkdp/fd
item.description: A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to ‘find’

item.title: peteonrails/voxtype
item.description: Voice-to-text with push-to-talk for Wayland compositors

item.title: KSXGitHub/parallel-disk-usage
item.description: Highly parallelized, blazing fast directory tree analyzer

item.title: bionic-gpt/bionic-gpt
item.description: Bionic is an on-premise replacement for ChatGPT, offering the advantages of Generative AI while maintaining strict data confidentiality

item.title: lencx/ChatGPT
item.description: 🔮 ChatGPT Desktop Application (Mac, Windows and Linux)

item.title: dani-garcia/vaultwarden
item.description: Unofficial Bitwarden compatible server written in Rust, formerly known as bitwarden_rs

item.title: GyulyVGC/sniffnet
item.description: Comfortably monitor your Internet traffic 🕵️‍♂️

item.title: elkowar/eww
item.description: ElKowars wacky widgets

item.title: ruffle-rs/ruffle
item.description: A Flash Player emulator written in Rust

item.title: ClementTsang/bottom
item.description: Yet another cross-platform graphical process/system monitor.

item.title: pvolok/mprocs
item.description: Run multiple commands in parallel

item.title: LemmyNet/lemmy
item.description: 🐀 A decentralised discussion platform for communities.

item.title: pythops/bluetui
item.description: 🛜 TUI for managing bluetooth on Linux

item.title: tikv/tikv
item.description: Distributed transactional key-value database, originally created to complement TiDB

item.title: neondatabase/neon
item.description: Neon: Serverless Postgres. We separated storage and compute to offer autoscaling, code-like database branching, and scale to zero.

item.title: orhun/git-cliff
item.description: A highly customizable Changelog Generator that follows Conventional Commit specifications ⛰️

item.title: lapce/lapce
item.description: Lightning-fast and Powerful Code Editor written in Rust

item.title: kcl-lang/kcl
item.description: KCL Programming Language Core and API (CNCF Sandbox Project). https://kcl-lang.io

item.title: rustformers/llm
item.description: [Unmaintained, see README] An ecosystem of Rust libraries for working with large language models

item.title: SeaDve/Kooha
item.description: Elegantly record your screen

item.title: sigoden/aichat
item.description: All-in-one LLM CLI tool featuring Shell Assistant, Chat-REPL, RAG, AI Tools & Agents, with access to OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, Groq, and more.

item.title: rustmailer/bichon
item.description: Bichon – A lightweight, high-performance Rust email archiver with WebUI

item.title: stoatchat/stoatchat
item.description: The software powering Stoat

item.title: Canop/dysk
item.description: A linux utility to get information on filesystems, like df but better

item.title: tectonic-typesetting/tectonic
item.description: A modernized, complete, self-contained TeX/LaTeX engine, powered by XeTeX and TeXLive.

item.title: raphamorim/rio
item.description: A hardware-accelerated GPU terminal emulator focusing to run in desktops and browsers.

item.title: nachoparker/dutree
item.description: a tool to analyze file system usage written in Rust

item.title: Dicklesworthstone/destructive_command_guard
item.description: The Destructive Command Guard (dcg) is for blocking dangerous git and shell commands from being executed by agents.

item.title: tranxuanthang/lrcget
item.description: Utility for mass-downloading LRC synced lyrics for your offline music library.

item.title: ironcalc/IronCalc
item.description: Main engine of the IronCalc ecosystem

item.title: ritz078/transform
item.description: A polyglot web converter.

item.title: versotile-org/verso
item.description: Mirror of https://gitlab.com/verso-browser/verso

item.title: pingcap/talent-plan
item.description: open source training courses about distributed database and distributed systems

item.title: google/comprehensive-rust
item.description: This is the Rust course used by the Android team at Google. It provides you the material to quickly teach Rust.

item.title: veeso/termscp
item.description: 🖥 A feature rich terminal UI file transfer and explorer with support for SCP/SFTP/FTP/S3/SMB

item.title: spieglt/FlyingCarpet
item.description: Cross-platform AirDrop. File transfer between Android, iOS, Linux, macOS, and Windows over ad hoc WiFi. No network infrastructure required, just two devices with WiFi chips (and optionally Bluetooth) in close range.

item.title: Julien-cpsn/ATAC
item.description: A simple API client (postman like) in your terminal

item.title: microsoft/aici
item.description: AICI: Prompts as (Wasm) Programs

item.title: pkgforge/soar
item.description: A fast, modern package manager for Static Binaries, Portable Formats (AppImage|AppBundle|FlatImage|Runimage) & More [maintainer=@QaidVoid]

item.title: coastalwhite/lemurs
item.description: A customizable TUI display/login manager written in Rust 🐒

item.title: frol/completely-unscientific-benchmarks
item.description: Naive performance comparison of a few programming languages (JavaScript, Kotlin, Rust, Swift, Nim, Python, Go, Haskell, D, C++, Java, C#, Object Pascal, Ada, Lua, Ruby)

item.title: lasantosr/intelli-shell
item.description: Like IntelliSense, but for shells

item.title: louisgv/local.ai
item.description: 🎒 local.ai - Run AI locally on your PC!

item.title: andre-brandao/gpui-shell
item.description: Wayland desktop shell and status bar in Rust with GPUI, featuring a modular bar, launcher, and control center for Hyprland and Niri.

item.title: lvkv/whenfs
item.description: A FUSE filesystem for your Google calendar

item.title: ChocolateLoverRaj/rust-fp
item.description: Fingerprint library, dbus interface, CLI, and PAM module for unlocking Linux with fingerprint sensors. Currently for Chromebooks.

item.title: nate-craft/yt-feeds
item.description: A fast, simple, and lightweight TUI application to watch subscription feeds from YouTube
